lines.speaker: Herman Caranos
lines.text: Ah, [player name]! How's the fishing going?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Still working on it. How's the Colony?

lines.speaker: Herman Caranos
lines.text: Flourishing, now that the colonists are coming back! Soon all the finest restaurants will be serving monkfish!

lines.speaker: Herman Caranos
lines.text: It's a pity those skeletons you brought here haven't gone away again, though. They're in the dormitories, which is rather annoying! So please take a little time to kick 'em around a bit.

lines.speaker: Herman Caranos
lines.text: Oh, and please don't call me Hermie.
